stories.headline: Jessica Chastain, Dolly Parton Among Stars Celebrating Taylor Swift-Travis Kelce Wedding - The Hollywood Reporter
Donald Trump Tries to Troll Taylor Swift on Her Wedding Night, But She Parties on - The Hollywood Reporter
stories.summary: The specter of a wedding on a holiday he seeks to own seemed to irk the president, or at least the staff manning the White House Instagram feed.

stories.headline: Brad Paisley, Kimberly Williams-Paisley Thank Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce for 'Amazing Donation' - Rolling Stone
stories.summary: Brad Paisley and Kimberly Williams-Paisley thanked Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce for their "amazing donation" ahead of the couple's wedding.
